# tplinkeasysmart_system_info (Data Source)

Read basic system inventory information from the switch.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "tplinkeasysmart_system_info" "switch" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Switch description string reported by the device.
- `firmware` (String) Firmware version reported by the switch.
- `gateway` (String) Current management default gateway reported by the switch.
- `hardware` (String) Hardware revision reported by the switch.
- `ip` (String) Current management IP address reported by the switch.
- `mac` (String) Base MAC address reported by the switch.
- `netmask` (String) Current management subnet mask reported by the switch.
